title: Tiny Totem Animation
description: A simple resource pack that adds subtle “pop” to Minecraft textures while keeping a vanilla feel.
body:
Small Totem Pop is a simple resource pack that reduces the size of the Totem of Undying animation.

When a totem activates, the visual effect is scaled down so it doesn’t block your screen. This makes it perfect for PvP and players who prefer a cleaner look.

✔ Vanilla compatible
✔ No mods required
✔ Lightweight and performance-friendly

Works on all supported Minecraft versions.
